recommendations.title: It's Kind of a Funny Story
recommendations.overview: A clinically depressed teenager gets a new start after he checks himself into an adult psychiatric ward.

recommendations.title: Get Duked!
recommendations.overview: An anarchic, hip-hop inspired comedy that follows four city boys on a wilderness trek as they try to escape a mysterious huntsman.

recommendations.title: El señor doctor
recommendations.overview: It's about a country doctor that comes to the city while a clinic is built in his home town... he rubs off his care and compassion on others at the hospital with his humor and wit.

recommendations.title: Hustle & Flow
recommendations.overview: With help from his friends, a Memphis pimp in a mid-life crisis attempts to become a successful hip-hop emcee.
